prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock 440 Magnum (RB2-E) with a stroked 512ci version using a Callies Compstar 4.500" crankshaft, Manley 6.800" H-beam connecting rods, and JE 10.5:1 forged pistons for 850+ hp on E85 with a custom camshaft grind (256°/262° duration, .680" lift) from Comp Cams paired with a T&D Machine shaft-mount roller rocker system

Forced Induction: Twin-turbo setup using Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos (82mm, 1.35 A/R) on custom T3/T4 hybrid manifolds by Indy Cylinder Head, feeding into a dual-core Spearco 4.5" intercooler with a Turbosmart Race Port BOV and a custom 4" aluminum intake plenum by Holley EFI

Fuel & Ignition: Full sequential fuel injection via Holley Dominator EFI with dual Bosch 044 fuel pumps, Injector Dynamics ID2000x injectors, and a custom billet fuel rail by FiTech, paired with an MSD Pro-Billet distributor and MSD 6AL-2 ignition box with a Moroso deep-sump oil pan and Canton accumulator
estetica: Body: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion using a Rocket Bunny V2 kit (Pandem) with custom front splitter, rear diffuser, and oversized fender flares to fit 12.5" wide Mickey Thompson ET Street R tires on 18x12" and 18x13" BBS LM-R wheels (gold finish)

Interior: Full Alcantara-wrapped Recaro SPG XL seats with custom embroidered Super Bee logos, a Momo Prototipo steering wheel on a NRG quick-release hub, and a full roll cage by Chassisworks (8-point, chromoly) with a custom rear seat delete for a fire suppression system by SPA Technique

Lighting & Details: Full LED conversion with LUX H8 V4 bulbs, custom Hella Rallye 3000 Supertones (yellow) with carbon fiber housings, and a custom matte black vinyl wrap with 3M Scotchcal Ghost Graphics (honeycomb pattern) over the original Hemi Orange paint
